zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel Moncrieffe於1434年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk25歲，母親Beatrix de Dundas18歲。她於1453年與Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年29歲。

zh-hans.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh-hans.Balwearie Castle, Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotl: 苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabel Moncrieffe于1434年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk25岁，母亲Beatrix de Dundas18岁。她于1453年与Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie在苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年在英国苏格兰費伏享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moncrieffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Moncrieff  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Jamaica.

variants.name: Moncrieff
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Moncrief  . This is the more common form in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel Moncrieffe was born in 1434, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk, was 25 and her mother, Beatrix de Dundas, was 18. She married Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie in 1453, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1463, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel Moncrieffe est née en 1434, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Dundas, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie en 1453, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel Moncrieffe 1434 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk 25 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Dundas 18. Sie hat 1453 in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Moncrieffe è nata il nel 1434 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Dundas, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie nel 1453, nel Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1463, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Moncrieffeが1434年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilkは25歳，母Beatrix de Dundasは18歳であった。1453年にスコットランドフィフキルクカルディでSir William Scott 7th of Balwearieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年にイギリススコットランドフィフで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Moncrieffe(이)가 1434년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Dundas(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1453년 스컷랜드 피프 커크캘디에서 Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Moncrieffe, Perthshire, Scotland, United: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Moncrieffe nasceu em 1434, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Dundas, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie em 1453, em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel Moncrieffe родилась в 1434 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Dundas, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie в 1453 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabel Moncrieffe nació en 1434, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Moncrieff 7th of that ilk, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Dundas, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie en 1453, en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1463, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
